name: Lemon Marinade.
recipeIngredient: 2 tbsp chopped fresh herbs (e.g., parsley, dill)
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix all ingredients together in a bowl.
2. Place the marinade in a shallow dish and add the pork, chicken, or fish.
3. Cover and refrigerate for at least 30 minutes to allow flavors to develop.
4. Cook over a barbecue, under the grill, or in the oven at 200°C/400°F/Gas 6 until fully cooked.
5. VARIATION: Experiment with different spices instead of fresh herbs for added flavor.
